faq.question: <p>Can I use an Insulated Curtain in place of an Insulated bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>It is not recommended or designed to take the place of an Insulated bulkhead.</p>

faq.question: <p>What type of material are the Insulated curtains made of?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Coated nylon insulated material with a radiant barrier or bubble pack insulation.</p>

faq.question: <p>What application is recommended for the Insulated curtains?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The insulated curtains are recommended and can be used to block the rear doors to prevent cold air loss.</p>

faq.question: <p>Will insulated curtains maintain an exact temperature?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Insulated curtains are not designed to maintain but designed to assist in preventing cold air loss.</p>
